description: A synthetic CT scan (~/DICOM/samples/synthetic/CT_slice_001.dcm) has been transmitted with corrupted presentation tags, making it appear washed out. Adjust the window and level settings to visualize the background gradient and central circular structure. Measure the horizontal and vertical diameters of the central circle and calculate the aspect ratio (Vertical Length / Horizontal Length). Create a report at ~/DICOM/exports/aspect_ratio_report.txt containing the Horizontal Length, Vertical Length, and Aspect Ratio. Export the viewport showing the visible structure and measurements to ~/DICOM/exports/aspect_ratio_view.jpg.
